'''habaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:practicedness|practicedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practicedness|practicedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| habaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbækæth|hæbækæth]] || [[word:hæbækæj|hæbækæj]] || [[word:hæbækæsh|hæbækæsh]] || [[word:hæbækæ|hæbækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hababakath|hababakath]] || [[word:hababakaj|hababakaj]] || [[word:hababakash|hababakash]] || [[word:hababaka|hababaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habakath|habakath]] || [[word:habakaj|habakaj]] || [[word:habakash|habakash]] || [[word:habaka|habaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habafkath|habafkath]] || [[word:habafkaj|habafkaj]] || [[word:habafkash|habafkash]] || [[word:habafkaf|habafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:habakatha|habakatha]] || [[word:habakaja|habakaja]] || [[word:habakasha|habakasha]] || [[word:habakaka|habakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:habakath|habakath]] || [[word:habakaj|habakaj]] || [[word:habakash|habakash]] || [[word:habaka|habaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:habakathal|habakathal]] || [[word:habakajal|habakajal]] || [[word:habakashal|habakashal]] || [[word:habakakal|habakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:habakathatha|habakathatha]] || [[word:habakajaja|habakajaja]] || [[word:habakashasha|habakashasha]] || [[word:habakaka|habakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:habakathan|habakathan]] || [[word:habakajan|habakajan]] || [[word:habakashan|habakashan]] || [[word:habakakan|habakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:habakathaoro|habakathaoro]] || [[word:habakajaoro|habakajaoro]] || [[word:habakashaoro|habakashaoro]] || [[word:habakakaoro|habakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
